name: Slow Cook Sweet & Sour Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. In a slow cooker, mix the cubed pork with cornstarch.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (except green pepper and tomatoes) to the slow cooker.
3. Cook on low for 8 hours.
4. Stir in the green pepper and tomatoes.
5. Cook on high for an additional 10 minutes.
